title: PMS Elves Behaving Badly Elf Doll Dress Up Outfit Christmas Novelty Accessory Gingerbread Man Costume
features: 🎄 Sweet Festive Fun: Transform your elf into a delightful gingerbread man with icing and button details.
✨ Perfect for Christmas Scenes: Adds a classic and heartwarming touch to your holiday elf setups.
🎁 Unique Elf Accessory: A creative costume that brings festive charm to your Elves Behaving Badly doll.
🛠️ Easy to Use: Quick and simple to dress your elf, with a secure fit for standard elf dolls.
📏 Lightweight and Durable: Made from high-quality materials for long-lasting fun.
description: Turn your elf into a festive favourite with the Gingerbread Man Costume. This charming outfit features a brown gingerbread-style design with adorable icing details and button accents. Perfect for adding a sweet touch to your elf’s Christmas antics.
